description: Multiple raw-HTML construction sites with user-controlled values flagged: 005a admin allowlist (`app/routes/admin.py:882`), 005c (`app/routes/corporations.py:668`), 005d/e/f (`app/routes/skill_plans.py:612/1038/1152`). title: Audit raw-HTML construction sites (VVP-2026-005a/c/d/e/f)
